role: The practical friend who wants easier healthy meals and responds with grounded realism.
look: Strong athletic man with light skin, short curly blond hair, light stubble, sturdy approachable build, focused expression, wearing a loose gray training shirt.
skin_tone: light skin in warm dark gym lighting
hair: short curly blond hair with natural texture
wardrobe: Loose charcoal gray athletic T-shirt, olive green training shorts, black smartwatch, white crew socks, white trainers. Keep the barbell/squat-rack gym context optional but visually consistent.
voice_direction: Medium-deep male voice, grounded gym-mate energy, slightly raw and real, friendly and practical rather than polished.
performance: Sounds like a real gym friend who wants convenience and clean food, not a spokesperson.
facial_expression_range: focused concentration, small skeptical smile, practical curiosity, relaxed relief
brand_role: relatable customer who needs convenience or product advocate depending on script
continuity_lock: Keep the same short curly blond hair, light stubble, loose gray T-shirt, olive shorts, black smartwatch, white crew socks, white trainers, strong sturdy build, and premium dark gym lighting across every frame.
negative_prompt: Do not change hair color, curly texture, stubble level, body type, outfit color, watch, shoes, skin tone, age range, or grounded practical personality. No sunglasses, no hat, no clean-shaven redesign, no beard, no tattoos added, no fitted tank replacing the gray shirt.
